subject: Project meeting schedule for Friday
body_text: Hi team, please join the project meeting this Friday at 10 AM in the lab. We will review the Week 14 progress and assign next steps.

subject: Book reservation is ready for pickup
body_text: The book you reserved is available at the main library circulation desk. Please pick it up within seven days using your student ID card.

subject: Database homework feedback released
body_text: Feedback for homework 3 has been released on the course platform. Please review the comments before the next lab session.

subject: Receipt for your textbook order
body_text: Thank you for your order. Your receipt is included below. The textbook will be shipped to the campus store for pickup next week.

subject: Volunteer signup for Saturday workshop
body_text: We need two volunteers for the robotics workshop on Saturday. Please reply if you can help with setup from 8 AM to 9 AM.

subject: Interview confirmation
body_text: This message confirms your interview on Monday at 2 PM. The meeting link will be sent from the same address one hour before the interview.

subject: Workshop registration confirmed
body_text: Your registration for the security workshop has been confirmed. Please bring your laptop and arrive ten minutes before the opening session.

subject: Paper discussion notes
body_text: Attached are the notes from today's paper discussion. Please read section 4 before our next meeting.

subject: Scheduled wireless maintenance
body_text: Campus wireless service may be unavailable from 1 AM to 3 AM on Sunday due to scheduled maintenance. No action is required from users.

subject: Updated project task list
body_text: I updated the shared task list after our meeting. Please check your assigned items before Wednesday and leave comments if anything is unclear.

subject: Monthly invoice available
body_text: Your monthly cloud lab invoice is available in the billing portal. The payment method on file will be charged automatically on June 5.

subject: Reminder: thesis proposal rehearsal
body_text: This is a calendar reminder for thesis proposal rehearsal tomorrow at 3 PM in room 402. Please bring printed slides if needed.
